biological_replicate: we generated a breeding colony of Fbxo24 knockout (KO) and wild type (WT) mice.
experimental_design: Fbxo24 KO mice showed a trend toward decreased bacterial loads compared to WT mice.
number_of_fractions: no fractionation or pre-fractionation is described.
number_of_biological_replicates: Fbxo24 knockout (KO) and wild type (WT) mice
number_of_samples: 2 biological replicates (1 KO and 1 WT) and 1 fraction.
